name: trade-auto
description: Claude-powered autonomous paper-trading platform on Cloudflare Workers + D1

scripts.dev:api: npm run build && wrangler pages dev --port 8788
scripts.preview: npm run build && wrangler pages dev --port 8788
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy
scripts.pages:create: wrangler pages project create trade-auto --production-branch main
scripts.test: node scripts/run-test.mjs src/worker/services/indicators.test.ts && node scripts/run-test.mjs src/worker/services/claude.test.ts && node scripts/run-test.mjs src/worker/services/paperTrading.test.ts
